name: beefree-sdk-examples
description: Collection of Beefree SDK example projects

scripts.start:autosave: yarn install && yarn --cwd autosave-versioning-example install && yarn && yarn --cwd autosave-versioning-example start
scripts.start:commenting: yarn install && yarn --cwd commenting-example install && yarn --cwd commenting-example start
scripts.start:conditional-rows: yarn install && yarn --cwd conditional-rows-example install && yarn && yarn --cwd conditional-rows-example start
scripts.start:custom-css: yarn install && yarn --cwd custom-css-example install && yarn --cwd custom-css-example start
scripts.start:multi-builder: yarn install && yarn --cwd multi-builder-switch-example install && yarn --cwd multi-builder-switch-example start
scripts.start:multi-language: yarn install && yarn --cwd multi-language-template-example install && yarn --cwd multi-language-template-example start
scripts.start:pdf-export: yarn install && yarn --cwd template-export-pdf-example install && yarn --cwd template-export-pdf-example start
scripts.start:salesforce-lwc: yarn install && yarn --cwd salesforce-lwc-example install && yarn --cwd salesforce-lwc-example start
scripts.start:secure-auth: yarn install && yarn --cwd secure-auth-example install && yarn --cwd secure-auth-example start
scripts.start:template-load: yarn install && yarn --cwd template-load-example install && yarn --cwd template-load-example start
scripts.start:web-components: yarn install && yarn --cwd web-components-example install && yarn --cwd web-components-example start

author: Beefree
